subcodes.first_line: O ye steadfast ones, O ye firm ones! His honor the divine Adib hath loosened his tongue in praise of you, in description and commendation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابتان ای راسخان جناب ادیب الهی لسان بستایش شما گشوده و در توصیف و تعریف
subcodes.subjects: @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @service to others; to the Cause of God
